tasks.title: Lighten and hide create-form placeholders on focus
tasks.objective: Make create-form placeholder examples very light by default and hide them while the user focuses/clicks into each field.
authority: Keep existing meaningful placeholder copy from ISSUE-010 unless a specific field requires a small adjustment for focus behavior.
Prefer standards-based CSS placeholder/focus behavior before adding custom client-side code.
Do not change create cohort validation or image upload behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Create-form placeholder text appears very light in unfocused empty fields.
Placeholder text is not visible while an affected field is focused.
Existing field labels and validation behavior remain intact.
The change covers text inputs and textareas that render placeholder examples.
Focused tests or browser smoke verify the relevant behavior.
verification: Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
Browser smoke test `/cohorts/new` placeholder contrast and focus behavior if UI changes are implemented.
tasks.area: create form, placeholder styling, focus behavior
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when placeholders are visually light and disappear on focus without altering create-flow semantics.
tasks.evidence: 2026-06-16: Added scoped create-form placeholder CSS so examples render very light when unfocused and become transparent with opacity 0 on input/textarea focus. Verified with focused create-cohort tests and browser computed-style smoke on `/cohorts/new`.
